subcodes.first_line: Take thou the chalice of utterance from the hands of thy Lord's loving-kindness, the All-Merciful, then drink therefrom before the faces of all religions. Thus [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: خذ قدح البیان من ایادی عنایه ربک الرحمن ثم اشرب منه امام وجوه الادیان کذلک
subcodes.subjects: @prophecy and fulfillment, @Seal of the Prophets, @Crimson Ark; the Ark of God, @Manifestation of God as sun
